case_title: CINDY LOOK VS. ELENA CELINO MAMARADLO et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-28-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-28-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOOK, CINDY AS TO DEFENDANT MAMARADLO, ELENA CELINO DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-24-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-25-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-09-2009

NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MAMARADLO, ELENA CELINO
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOOK, CINDY JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAR-04-2010.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR DEBRA FINK BOGAARDS.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR RANDALL PHILIP CHOY.
REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR APR-06-2010 AFTER HEARING; MATTER DID NOT SETTLE

ARBITRATOR DAVID BERNARD LYNCH APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAR-05-2010 THROUGH JUN-03-2010.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
